ClaimCeiling.description: Graduated claim authority tier representing the maximum claim strength.
ClaimCeiling.title: ClaimCeiling

PrivacyClass.description: Privacy clearance level of a card.
PrivacyClass.title: PrivacyClass

RedactionPolicy.description: Redaction policies applied before public publication.
RedactionPolicy.title: RedactionPolicy

SourceQuality.description: Tier-based quality rating of underlying sources/grounding.
SourceQuality.title: SourceQuality

description:
Canonical model card record for a novel Hapax concept.

Provides a public explanation layer that makes novel concepts and public
claims legible without overclaiming, leaking private material, or hiding
limitations.

concept_id.description: Unique stable persistent identifier for the concept.
concept_id.title: Concept Id

description.description: Detailed description of the concept's meaning and purpose.
description.title: Description

formation_provenance.description: Provenance chain of the concept's formation (e.g. research -> spec -> implementation).
formation_provenance.title: Formation Provenance

claim_scope.description: The scope of what this concept claims to cover.
claim_scope.title: Claim Scope

claim_ceiling.description: The maximum claim strength or authority tier.

evidence_refs.description: References to supporting evidence cards or documents.
evidence_refs.title: Evidence Refs

limitations.description: Known limitations or boundaries of the concept.
limitations.title: Limitations

what_this_does_not_prove.description: Explicit statement of what the existence of this concept does NOT establish.
what_this_does_not_prove.title: What This Does Not Prove

related_terms.description: Related terms or concepts for cross-reference.
related_terms.title: Related Terms

privacy_class.description: Privacy clearance level of this concept card.

redaction_policy.description: Redaction policy applied to the card before public publication.

public_allowlist_approved.description: Whether the concept card has been explicitly approved for the public allowlist.
public_allowlist_approved.title: Public Allowlist Approved

source_quality.description: Overall quality rating of the underlying grounding/sources.

freshness_timestamp.description: Timestamp indicating when this concept card was last verified or updated.
freshness_timestamp.title: Freshness Timestamp

title: HapaxConceptCard
